metadata.description: End-to-end verification bundle for OpenHands — onboard a repository for AI-agent readiness, then iterate on pull requests through CI, code review, and QA until merge-ready.

plugins.name: onboarding
plugins.description: Assess repository agent-readiness across five pillars, propose high-impact fixes, and generate repo-specific AGENTS.md files.

plugins.name: iterate
plugins.description: Iterate on a GitHub pull request — drive it through CI, code review, and QA until merge-ready. Monitors state, fixes failures, addresses review feedback, retries flaky checks, and pushes fixes in one continuous loop.
